label: Vigilant's Rest
description: Vigilant's Rest is a compact bedchamber cut into the Temple of the Rift-Vigil’s basalt mass, its walls faced in soot-dark stone and slagcrete ribs that mute the city’s ash-laden gales. A low sleeping dais and narrow storage niches are set beneath a ceiling of copper grounding strips, tying the room into the temple’s electrostatic bleed network. Auroraglass slit-prisms admit bruise-violet bands of light that fall in hard, unyielding angles across the vitrified floor. Vox-silencing insulation thickens the door surround, preserving the chamber as a rare pocket of controlled quiet within the relay-sanctuary.
